name: Green Apple
tagline: Crisp orchard freshness that lingers all day
description: A vibrant burst of freshly picked green apples blended with subtle citrus undertones. This invigorating scent captures the essence of a crisp morning in an Australian orchard, delivering a clean and refreshing fragrance that melts into the skin and lasts from dawn to dusk.

name: Strawberry Rose
tagline: Sweet fruity-floral romance in every drop
description: A luscious marriage of sun-ripened strawberries and velvety Damascus rose petals. This enchanting blend balances sweetness with sophistication, creating a warm, fruity-floral fragrance that wraps around you like a whispered compliment. Engineered for longevity with high-concentration perfume oils.

name: Vanilla
description: Pure Madagascan vanilla essence enveloped in warm amber and delicate caramel undertones. This timeless scent is the definition of comfort — a rich, creamy fragrance that melts into the skin and becomes uniquely yours. A staple for those who appreciate understated elegance.

name: Musk
description: A masterfully crafted blend of clean white musk layered with subtle woody accords. This deeply smooth fragrance embodies timeless sophistication — equally at home in the boardroom or an evening out. The high-concentration oil formula ensures this scent becomes your signature from the first application.

name: Tea Rose
description: An exquisite interpretation of the classic tea rose — delicate, refined, and timeless. This scent captures the essence of a heritage rose garden in full bloom, with layers of fresh green leaves and soft floral petals. Handcrafted with care for those who cherish traditional florals with lasting power.

name: Honeysuckle
description: Capture the golden warmth of a summer afternoon with this luminous honeysuckle blend. Sweet nectar-like notes dance with delicate floral accords, creating a fragrance that is both uplifting and deeply comforting. Each drop is freshly poured to preserve the authentic essence of sun-warmed honeysuckle blooms.

name: Rose Geranium
description: A beautifully complex blend where the rosy sweetness of geranium leaf meets fresh herbaceous green notes. This artisanal fragrance is both grounding and uplifting — a botanical masterpiece that evolves on the skin throughout the day. Crafted in small batches to ensure every bottle delivers the perfect balance.

name: Forget Me Not
description: A whisper-soft floral that leaves a lasting impression. This delicate blend mirrors the understated beauty of forget-me-not blossoms — gentle, ethereal, and impossible to forget. The lightest scent in our collection, yet engineered with the same high-concentration oils for remarkable staying power.
